name: Flour + Water Pizzeria
teaser: Goes breadier and better than the original restaurant, with a distinctly bulbous, airy crust and great chef-approved ingredients.
review: The original Flour + Water restaurant serves amazing pasta but just good Neapolitan pizza. At the pizzeria, they go breadier (and better) with a distinctly bulbous, airy crust, all while keeping all the same high-quality chef-approved ingredients.
headsUp: San Francisco's best pizza is in a beautiful room. It deserves a proper night out.
update: Still the standard bearer for SF pizza.
address: 532 Columbus Ave, San Francisco, CA 94133, USA
hours: Monday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Thursday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Friday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Saturday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM · Sunday: 11:30 AM – 10:00 PM
